# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure SQL Database for our application. Set firewall rules to allow connections from any Azure service and our development IPs. For the admin login, use 'sqladmin' with password 'AzureSQL2024!'. Make it accessible for development and testing. This is for our staging environment.
# Category: cloud_database_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]"
    },
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[concat('stg-sql-', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id))]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "stagingdb"
    },
    "administratorLogin": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "sqladmin"
    },
    "administratorLoginPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "defaultValue": "AzureSQL2024!"
    },
    "devIpRules": {
      "type": "array",
      "defaultValue": [
        {
          "name": "DevIP-1",
          "startIpAddress": "203.0.113.10",
          "endIpAddress": "203.0.113.10"
        },
        {
          "name": "DevIP-2",
          "startIpAddress": "198.51.100.25",
          "endIpAddress": "198.51.100.25"
        }
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Development public IP rules to allow through SQL Server firewall. Replace defaults with your actual IPs."
      }
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "sqlServerVersion": "12.0",
    "dbSkuName": "Basic",
    "dbSkuTier": "Basic",
    "dbCollation": "SQL_Latin1_General_CP1_CI_AS",
    "minTlsVersion": "1.2"
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "version": "[variables('sqlServerVersion')]",
        "administratorLogin": "[parameters('administratorLogin')]",
        "administratorLoginPassword": "[parameters('administratorLoginPassword')]",
        "minimalTlsVersion": "[variables('minTlsVersion')]",
        "publicNetworkAccess": "Enabled"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/AllowAzureServices')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "0.0.0.0",
        "endIpAddress": "0.0.0.0"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/firewallRules",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpFirewallCopy')].name)]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "copy": {
        "name": "devIpFirewallCopy",
        "count": "[length(parameters('devIpRules'))]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "startIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpFirewallCopy')].startIpAddress]",
        "endIpAddress": "[parameters('devIpRules')[copyIndex('devIpFirewallCopy')].endIpAddress]"
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Sql/servers/databases",
      "apiVersion": "2022-05-01-preview",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('sqlServerName'), '/', parameters('sqlDatabaseName'))]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName'))]"
      ],
      "sku": {
        "name": "[variables('dbSkuName')]",
        "tier": "[variables('dbSkuTier')]"
      },
      "properties": {
        "collation": "[variables('dbCollation')]",
        "readScale": "Disabled",
        "zoneRedundant": false
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "sqlServerName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlServerName')]"
    },
    "sqlDatabaseName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('sqlDatabaseName')]"
    },
    "sqlServerFullyQualifiedDomainName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Sql/servers', parameters('sqlServerName')), '2022-05-01-preview').fullyQualifiedDomainName]"
    }
  }
}
